source: US-listed ETFs and Yahoo Finance spot pairs. Prices are fetched through the shared RLDATA daily-bar cache; no prices or model outputs are stored in this file.
note: Asset entries are visible research candidates. Hidden driver entries are fetched only to power the distinct proxy models. ETF and futures-linked products can diverge from spot because of fees, tracking error, trading-session gaps, and futures roll drag.

gold.label: Gold monetary-metal model
gold.formula: trend + inverse USD + duration/real-rate proxy - volatility/drawdown penalty

silver.label: Silver hybrid-metal model
silver.formula: trend + falling gold/silver ratio + gold confirmation + industrial proxy - risk penalty

bitcoin.label: Bitcoin price-risk model
bitcoin.formula: trend + risk-appetite confirmation - realized-volatility and drawdown penalties; no on-chain inputs

crypto.label: Crypto price-risk model
crypto.formula: trend + equity-risk and bitcoin confirmation - realized-volatility and drawdown penalties; no on-chain inputs

energy.label: Energy commodity model
energy.formula: trend + energy-equity confirmation + real-asset breadth - risk penalty

broad.label: Broad commodity model
broad.formula: trend + cross-commodity breadth + inverse USD confirmation - risk penalty

industrial.label: Industrial-metals model
industrial.formula: trend + cross-commodity breadth + industrial-equity confirmation - risk penalty

agriculture.label: Agriculture model
agriculture.formula: trend + cross-commodity breadth + broad-commodity/inverse-USD confirmation - risk penalty

platinum.label: Platinum hybrid-metal model
platinum.formula: trend + cross-commodity breadth + gold/industrial confirmation - risk penalty

entries.label: SPDR Gold Shares
entries.description: Large, liquid physically backed gold ETF proxy.

entries.label: iShares Gold Trust
entries.description: Physically backed gold ETF with a lower share price and fee profile than GLD.

entries.label: iShares Silver Trust
entries.description: Physically backed silver ETF proxy with both monetary- and industrial-metal sensitivity.

entries.label: Bitcoin USD
entries.description: Yahoo Finance bitcoin price pair. Trades seven days while ETF drivers trade US sessions.

entries.label: iShares Bitcoin Trust ETF
entries.description: US-session spot-bitcoin ETF proxy; fees and session gaps can create tracking differences.

entries.label: ProShares Bitcoin Strategy ETF
entries.description: Bitcoin-futures ETF whose return can differ materially from spot because of futures roll and fees.

entries.label: Ethereum USD
entries.description: Yahoo Finance ether price pair; the model uses price and market proxies only, never on-chain data.

entries.label: Invesco DB Commodity Index Tracking Fund
entries.description: Broad futures-linked commodity basket with meaningful energy exposure and roll effects.

entries.label: Invesco Optimum Yield Diversified Commodity Strategy
entries.description: Actively managed broad commodity futures vehicle; structure and rolls differ from DBC.

entries.label: United States Oil Fund
entries.description: WTI-linked futures vehicle; curve shape and roll policy affect returns.

entries.label: United States Brent Oil Fund
entries.description: Brent-linked futures vehicle; not a direct barrel-of-oil spot holding.

entries.label: United States Copper Index Fund
entries.description: Copper futures proxy used as an industrial-metals and global-cycle gauge.

entries.label: Invesco DB Agriculture Fund
entries.description: Agriculture futures basket exposed to weather, crop cycles, curve shape, and roll drag.

entries.label: abrdn Physical Platinum Shares ETF
entries.description: Physically backed platinum proxy with precious- and industrial-demand sensitivities.

entries.label: Invesco DB US Dollar Index Bullish Fund
entries.description: Dollar-direction proxy; inverse performance is treated as a real-assets tailwind.

entries.label: iShares 20+ Year Treasury Bond ETF
entries.description: Long-duration Treasury proxy used as one component of the gold rate backdrop.

entries.label: iShares TIPS Bond ETF
entries.description: TIPS proxy used relative to TLT as a rough rate/inflation mix, not a direct real-yield series.

entries.label: Invesco QQQ Trust
entries.description: Nasdaq-100 risk-appetite proxy used by bitcoin and crypto price-risk models.

entries.label: Energy Select Sector SPDR Fund
entries.description: Energy-equity confirmation proxy for oil-linked instruments.

entries.label: Industrial Select Sector SPDR Fund
entries.description: Industrial-equity proxy for silver, copper, and platinum demand confirmation.
